sources.name: OpenAI News
sources.notes: The public RSS feed is valid and column-matching. The official page returned 403 to the scripted client, so page access should not be used as the primary access path.

sources.name: Anthropic Newsroom
sources.notes: The page is accessible, but no RSS/Atom rel alternate declaration or public feed link was found in the page HTML during this batch.

sources.name: Google Cloud AI & Machine Learning Blog
sources.notes: The official page is accessible, but no RSS/Atom rel alternate declaration or public feed link was found in the page HTML during this batch.

sources.name: Microsoft 365 Copilot Release Notes
sources.notes: The release-notes page is accessible, but no page-declared RSS/Atom feed was found. The existing Microsoft AI feed is valid but broad and not a release-notes feed.

sources.name: Azure AI Foundry Blog
sources.notes: The page exposes a board RSS link and the feed is valid, public, itemized, and column-matching.

sources.name: DeepSeek API News
sources.notes: The original candidate URL https://api-docs.deepseek.com/news returned 404. The official API documentation homepage is public, and its stable Change Log entry is https://api-docs.deepseek.com/updates. No RSS or Atom feed declaration was found on the updates page, so the recommended access path is webpage monitoring.

sources.name: 阿里云百炼 Model Studio
sources.notes: The original product URL redirects to an Alibaba Cloud notfound page. A better official long-term source was found in Alibaba Cloud Model Studio release notes. It is public, continuously updated, and focused on model, pricing, API, context-cache, and platform changes. No RSS/Atom declaration was found.

sources.name: 腾讯云智能体开发平台 ADP
sources.notes: The product page is public and includes product dynamics, use cases, and customer cases. No RSS/Atom declaration was found. Product marketing noise exists, so a monitor should target dated dynamics and case blocks only.

sources.name: 火山引擎方舟 Ark
sources.notes: The official product page returns a JavaScript app shell to the script client, but the official Volcengine Ark documentation contains a public product update announcements page with product, model release, model retirement, SDK, RAG, and billing-related entries. No RSS/Atom declaration was found. Use this documentation announcement page rather than the product homepage.

sources.name: 华为云 AgentArts
sources.notes: The official product page is public and includes links or visible sections for customer cases, news reports, and service announcements. No RSS/Atom declaration was found; monitoring should prefer dated announcement/case blocks rather than the marketing hero.

sources.name: Workday AI
sources.notes: The official AI topic page is accessible, but no RSS/Atom rel alternate declaration or public feed link was found in the page HTML during this batch.

sources.name: ServiceNow AI
sources.notes: The original ServiceNow AI blog topic still timed out from the script client. A better official long-term source was found in ServiceNow Now Assist and agentic AI release notes. It is public and focused on Now Assist, AI agents, employee service, ITSM, CSM, and platform AI release changes. No RSS/Atom declaration was found.

sources.name: Salesforce Blog / Agentforce
sources.notes: The official blog page declares an RSS feed and the feed is valid. Recent entries are strongly AI/Agentforce/CRM-heavy, but there are also broad SaaS and small-business posts, so downstream filtering is needed.

sources.name: HubSpot AI
sources.notes: The HubSpot AI page redirects to the Breeze AI product page and links to official Spotlight/Product Updates, Blog, and Case Studies. Spotlight is the best long-term monitoring entry because it contains AI, Breeze, Sales Hub, Service Hub, CRM, and Customer Agent updates with lower noise than the broad blog. The case-study RSS is valid but broad and not AI-specific, while Spotlight has no RSS declaration.

sources.name: Zendesk AI Blog
sources.notes: The candidate category URL redirects to the official Zendesk AI tag page. The page is public and relevant to AI customer service, agents, copilot, and quality management, but no RSS/Atom declaration was found. Use webpage monitoring and filter out navigation and generic product-marketing text.

sources.name: Intercom AI & ML
sources.notes: The official AI and automation category declares a category RSS feed. The feed is valid and recent entries match customer support AI, sales agents, service agents, knowledge management, and outcome measurement.

sources.name: Glean Blog
sources.notes: The official blog is public and exposes a dated article listing with strong enterprise AI, agent, search, governance, and RAG fit. No RSS/Atom declaration was found.

sources.name: Atlassian AI / Rovo
sources.notes: The candidate AI URL resolves to the broad Inside Atlassian blog. The page includes AI at Work, AI Research, and Rovo material, but the declared blog feed returned HTML in this verification run and could not be parsed as RSS. Monitor focused AI/Rovo blocks rather than ingesting the broad blog.

sources.name: McKinsey State of AI
sources.notes: The official McKinsey State of AI page timed out in the script client during this run. This is a low-frequency, high-value research source and should enter the deep-report workflow rather than 24-hour news sorting. No verified public RSS/Atom was found in this batch. Enters the Deep Reports section and is excluded from 24-hour hot ranking.

sources.name: Deloitte State of AI in the Enterprise
sources.notes: The official report page is public and highly relevant to enterprise AI adoption, scaling, governance, ROI, and workforce readiness. No RSS/Atom declaration was found. It should be handled as a deep report source, not a daily news source.

sources.name: 中国信通院专题报告
sources.notes: The official CAICT report index returned HTTP 412 to the script client. This is a high-value domestic policy, standards, and deep-report source, but page automation and PDF download stability are insufficient. Use monthly manual review and PDF evidence archiving; do not include it in 24-hour news sorting. Enters the Domestic Policy, Standards, and Deep Reports section and is excluded from 24-hour hot ranking.

sources.name: InfoQ AI
sources.notes: The existing InfoQ feed is valid and public, but it is a broad site feed rather than a verified /topic/AI feed. Do not add the topic page separately before overlap review.

sources.name: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
sources.notes: The official NIST AI RMF page is public and stable. It is a low-frequency governance and risk reference source, not a daily news source. No RSS/Atom declaration was found on the page.

sources.name: OWASP GenAI Security Project
sources.notes: The official OWASP GenAI Security Project page declares a public RSS feed. The feed is valid and focused on GenAI security, agentic application risks, exploit reports, project updates, and governance resources.
